products.name: AQUA
products.description: The flagship first-party AI of Aquiplex — chat, memory, reasoning, codebase and document understanding, and repository editing in one.

products.name: Workspace Intelligence
products.description: Upload a repository and get an automatic codebase overview, dependency graph, and architecture map that AQUA can reason over and edit.

products.name: Universal Upload
products.description: Bring in any file — archives, PDFs, spreadsheets, slides, images, audio — and AQUA classifies, extracts, and uses it in the conversation.

_meta.note: Add or rename products as the platform grows.
